    1. onDeviceFound(BleDevice)

Interface ScanCallback

Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface ScanCallback
Receives BLE scan results as they are discovered.

Implementations must be thread-safe because the callback may be invoked from a background thread managed by the platform BLE stack.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    onDeviceFound(@NonNull BleDevice device)
    Called each time a BLE peripheral is discovered or its advertisement data is updated.

  • Method Details

    • onDeviceFound

      void onDeviceFound(@NonNull BleDevice device)
      Called each time a BLE peripheral is discovered or its advertisement data is updated.

      The same peripheral may be reported multiple times as its advertisement is re-broadcast. Callers should use BleDevice.id() as a stable identifier.

      Parameters:
      device - the discovered peripheral; never null
